title: verbascum × samium
intro: Verbascum × samium, also known as Mullein, is a biennial plant that belongs to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) and is a natural hybrid between Verbascum lychnitis and Verbascum thapsus. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Mullein include soothing respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as providing relief from skin irritations, wounds, and ear infections. Mullein can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tincture, salve, and oil, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
